yara_rules.name: Cobalt_Strike_Beacon
yara_rules.description: Detects Cobalt Strike beacon binary patterns
yara_rules.rule_content:
rule Cobalt_Strike_Beacon {
  meta:
    description = "Detects Cobalt Strike beacon"
    author = "XCloak Threat Intel"
    severity = "critical"
  strings:
    $cs1 = "MZ" nocase
    $cs2 = { 4D 5A 90 00 03 00 00 00 }
    $jitter = "sleep_mask" nocase
    $pipe = "\\\\.\\pipe\\msagent_" wide
  condition:
    $cs1 at 0 and ($jitter or $pipe)
}

yara_rules.name: Mimikatz_Generic
yara_rules.description: Detects Mimikatz credential dump tool variants
yara_rules.rule_content:
rule Mimikatz_Generic {
  meta:
    description = "Detects Mimikatz variants"
    severity = "critical"
  strings:
    $s1 = "sekurlsa" nocase
    $s2 = "lsadump" nocase
    $s3 = "mimikatz" nocase
    $s4 = "privilege::debug" nocase
  condition:
    2 of them
}

yara_rules.name: BlackCat_Ransomware
yara_rules.rule_content:
rule BlackCat_Ransomware {
  meta:
    description = "Detects BlackCat/ALPHV ransomware"
    severity = "critical"
  strings:
    $enc1 = ".encrypted" wide
    $note = "RECOVER-" wide
    $rust = "ALPHV_BLACKCAT" nocase
  condition:
    2 of them
}

hunt_templates.name: C2 Beacon Detection Hunt
hunt_templates.description: Hunt for periodic outbound connections matching C2 beacon patterns
hunt_templates.kql_query: source="network" | where bytes_out > 1000 AND connection_interval < 120 | stats count by remote_ip | where count > 10

hunt_templates.name: LSASS Memory Access Hunt
hunt_templates.description: Hunt for processes accessing LSASS memory outside of known security tools
hunt_templates.kql_query: source="process" | where target_process="lsass.exe" AND NOT source_process IN ("svchost.exe","antivirus.exe") | table host,source_process,timestamp

hunt_templates.name: Lateral Movement via SMB Hunt
hunt_templates.description: Detect SMB connections from workstations to servers outside business hours
hunt_templates.kql_query: source="network" | where dst_port=445 AND src_type="workstation" AND hour(timestamp) NOT IN (8..18) | table src_ip,dst_ip,timestamp

hunt_templates.name: PowerShell Encoded Command Hunt
hunt_templates.description: Hunt for base64-encoded PowerShell payloads across all endpoints
hunt_templates.kql_query: source="process" | where process_name="powershell.exe" AND cmdline MATCHES "-[Ee][Nn][Cc]" | table host,cmdline,user,timestamp

hunt_templates.name: Persistence via Scheduled Tasks
hunt_templates.description: Detect newly created scheduled tasks with suspicious executables
hunt_templates.kql_query: source="event" | where event_id=4698 AND task_content MATCHES "(cmd.exe|powershell.exe|wscript.exe)" | table host,task_name,timestamp
